parameters.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS pending_count
FROM pipemind.approval_drafts
WHERE feature_tag = 'F-01'
  AND content_type = 'report'
  AND status = 'pending'
  AND created_at >= date_trunc('week', now())
  AND expires_at > now();
SELECT discord_id, name FROM pipemind.roster WHERE active = true AND role = 'team_lead' ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 1;
